rulings.Case Title: SYED ALI VS. BIG DADDY'S ANTIQUES SF ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Bd Antiques S.F., Inc.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 4, 2022 line 1. Defendant Bd Antiques S.F., Inc.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation is CONTINUED to May 13, 2022 to allow Defendant BD Antiques SF, Inc. an opportunity to obtain counsel. (See Merco Constr. Engineers, Inc. v. Municipal Court (1978) 21 Cal.3d 724, 729-730.) =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
